TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tafugan, title = Tafugan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tafugan} }

S.FORM: alang Tafugan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 33 buwan, 69 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 78% kyan ku 54 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 22% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 78%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tafugan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tafugan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tafugan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tafugan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tafugan hya' ga Cawi. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tafugan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tafugan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tafugan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Toyohama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 33 buwan, 69 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 78% kyan ku 54 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 22% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 78%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tafugan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tafugan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tafugan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tafugan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tafugan hya' ga Cawi. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tafugan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tafugan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ta*uɣan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu tojoħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ta*uɣan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ta*uɣan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ta*uɣan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ta*uɣan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ta*uɣan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨawi. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ta*uɣan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ta*uɣan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
